{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Dreadgod defense
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Dreadgod defense]] can withstand powerful foreign weapons like the [[Shells of the Titan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
